svg.text: client submits rental_request for a room
manager accepts → tenancy created, room = occupied
invoice generated → pdf_url stored in Storage
client raises complaint → messages thread builds
owner sends manager_invite → token link → accepted
Every table is scoped by tenant_id — multi-tenant isolation enforced at DB level via RLS
profiles.role drives all access control: super_admin > owner > manager > client > worker
